39.kj: accomplish, advance, appoint, apt, be at, become, bear, bestow, bring forth, bruise, be busy, [idiom] certainly, have the charge of, commit, deal (with), deck, [phrase] displease,

39.gl: properly, an appointment, i.e. a fixed time or season; specifically, a festival; conventionally ayear; by implication, an assembly (as convened for a definite purpose); technically the congregation; by extension, the pla
39.kj: appointed (sign, time), (place of, solemn) assembly, congregation, (set, solemn) feast, (appointed, due) season, solemn(-ity), synogogue, (set) time (appointed).
39.dv: or מֹעֵד; or (feminine) מוֹעָדָה; (2 Chronicles 8:13), from H3259 (יָעַד);

39.gl: properly, separation; by implication, a part of the body, branch of atree, bar forcarrying; figuratively, chief of a city; especially (with prepositional prefix) as an adverb, apart, only, besides
39.kj: alone, apart, bar, besides, branch, by self, of each alike, except, only, part, staff, strength.

39.gl: properly (abstractly) spontaneity, or (adjectively) spontaneous; also (concretely) a spontaneous or (by inference, in plural) abundant gift
39.kj: free(-will) offering, freely, plentiful, voluntary(-ily, offering), willing(-ly), offering).

39.gl: a step or (collectively, stairs, as ascending); usually a holocaust (as going up in smoke)
39.kj: ascent, burnt offering (sacrifice), go up to. See also H5766 (עֶוֶל).
39.dv: or עוֹלָה; feminine active participle of H5927 (עָלָה);

39.gl: a donation; euphemistically, tribute; specifically a sacrificial offering (usually bloodless and voluntary)
39.dv: from an unused root meaning to apportion, i.e. bestow;
